name: Skill Advisor - Direct Graph Query
description: Validates that the Skill Advisor can fall back to query_skill_graph for domain-specific Cypher queries when structured tool helpers are insufficient.

parts.text: Show me all skills in the DevOps domain from the graph.
I queried the skill knowledge graph for all skills in the DevOps domain. Here are the results from the graph.

args.cypher_query: MATCH (s:Skill) WHERE s.domain = $domain RETURN coalesce(s.name, s.id) AS name, s.description AS description
